objective: activate APEX formula transmission chain for verified closed-loop work across any scenario
apex_formula: ApexPraisonChain = RoleAgents × TaskGraph × ProcessMode × ToolGate × VerifyLoop × MemLedger

agents.name: planner
agents.goal: decompose the objective into a minimal dependency graph
agents.backstory: PraisonAI-style coordinator: role-first planning, explicit task ownership, no hidden work.

agents.name: builder
agents.goal: produce concrete files, code, commands, or artifacts
agents.backstory: Execution-focused agent: every claim should map to an artifact or command output.

agents.name: critic
agents.goal: find failure modes and verify with the smallest meaningful gate
agents.backstory: Adversarial reviewer: rejects self-scoring without evidence.

tasks.title: Clarify objective and constraints
tasks.input: activate APEX formula transmission chain for verified closed-loop work across any scenario
verify: objective is restated as testable outputs

tasks.title: Build or modify concrete artifact
tasks.input: activate APEX formula transmission chain for verified closed-loop work across any scenario

tasks.title: Distill reusable knowledge
tasks.input: activate APEX formula transmission chain for verified closed-loop work across any scenario
tasks.expected_output: memory/skill entry with source and usage

tasks.title: Independent verification
tasks.input: activate APEX formula transmission chain for verified closed-loop work across any scenario

transmission_chain: APEX formula mirror: identify shortest real bottleneck before acting
Praison role chain: planner -> builder -> critic -> memory archivist
OpenHands execution boundary: bounded filesystem/terminal action through harness bridge
Evidence validator: admit only sourced, committed, verified records
no_virtual_data: No PHI promotion without a runnable gate artifact.
activation.background_use: Use this skill when a task needs multi-agent decomposition, execution, verification, and memory admission as one closed APEX loop.
